feature_flags: default
real_type: f64
operation_sequence: Profile::from_svg -> Profile::to_svg -> Profile::from_svg -> triangulate
input_coordinates: M0,0,100,0,100,100 z
metadata: none
expected_behavior: SVG roundtrip preserves semantic polygon/triangle content without requiring identical path point ordering.
observed_behavior: Raw path strings may reorder equivalent ring coordinates.
normalized_geometry_summary: one polygon, one triangle after triangulation, finite coordinates, no metadata.
